Launching your list – avatar worksheet
Avatar Worksheet
It’s hyper critical to have a thorough understanding of what makes your Avatar tick. Take
some time now and answer these important questions about your Avatar!
Who is your Avatar? (gender, age, marital status, kids, interests and
passions, where do they live, likes and dislikes, etc.)
